rationale: The only resume change was the end date of a caregiving career gap, and neither evaluation references the gap, caregiving, or Berlin in its reasoning. Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and the identical core conclusion: a Staff-level hands-on engineer with very recent, shallow AI experience who falls short of a Director/Principal strategic role. The surface differences — '15+ years' vs '18+ years', and which strengths get listed (cloud/containers vs AI agent infrastructure/workshops) — are reworded summaries of the same underlying profile and fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. None of these shifts key off the demographic detail that changed.
